overall.description: Game engine footage showing a slow panoramic sweep around the Louvre Pyramid in Paris. The camera smoothly circles the glass pyramid structure under bright midday sun, revealing the contrast between the modern pyramid and surrounding historic French Renaissance palace architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic museum courtyard with glass pyramid

agents.ego_description: slowly panning left around the pyramid to survey the museum courtyard and architecture

entered.detail: large glass and metal pyramid structure with triangular grid pattern
historic stone palace building with classical French Renaissance architecture and mansard roofs
stone triumphal arch visible in the distant courtyard background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the iconic glass pyramid of the Louvre Museum, positioned prominently in the center-right of the frame. The historic stone palace wing stands to the left under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds, while the camera begins a slow leftward pan across the empty paved courtyard.

events.description: glass pyramid exits frame right revealing full palace wing and distant triumphal arch

agents.ego_description: continuing the leftward pan as the pyramid leaves view, focusing on the palace colonnade

entered.detail: row of classical stone columns and arched windows on the palace ground floor

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the glass pyramid moves out of frame and the view opens to reveal the detailed colonnade of the palace wing. The distant triumphal arch becomes more prominent in the center background across the empty courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic palace facade with distant arch

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep focusing on the palace architecture and distant courtyard landmarks

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the palace wing moving toward the right edge of the frame while the distant triumphal arch shifts to the left side. The camera maintains its smooth leftward motion across the vast empty courtyard, showcasing the scale of the historic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan that shifts focus from the modern glass pyramid to the expansive scale of the historic palace architecture. It begins with the iconic pyramid positioned prominently against a bright blue sky, while the stone palace wing frames the left side of the empty paved courtyard. As the camera continues its smooth motion, the pyramid glides out of frame to reveal the detailed colonnade of the palace wing and a distant triumphal arch emerging in the center background. The scene then expands further across the vast courtyard, causing the palace wing to shift toward the right edge as the triumphal arch moves to the left. Finally, the camera maintains its steady sweep, emphasizing the immense proportions of the surrounding French Renaissance structures.
